subject: [PATCHv7 02/18] mm: Change the interface of prep_compound_tail()

reviews.author: Kiryl Shutsemau (Meta)
reviews.summary: The patch series is a preparation for changing how the head position is encoded in the tail page. It changes the interface of prep_compound_tail() to pass the tail and head pages directly, along with the order of the compound page.

2026-02-27.patch_summary: This patch series changes the interface of prep_compound_tail() to pass the tail and head pages directly, along with the order of the compound page, instead of passing down the head page and tail page index.
